objects.text:
bait cone
left of both towers

Spots are decided looking at the boss
Cones/Spreads can be on opposite roles

Towers will always be shown south 
but they'll rotate cw or ccw each set

Soak the stack on the same side
as you are gonna resolve youre tower

New assignement
Odds always spawn 2 cones 2 spreads

ATTENTION:
These will only go into effect at the next odd set.
For the very next set you'll be doing baits still

Stacks move into the boss
Left on hitbox
Right closer in

Left spread take the cone
max melee left of both towers

Right spread hugs right tower 
on hitbox

Bait clones asap. Need to be quick.
Easiest to have everyone do it incase someone forgets/slow

Half arena cleave
(slightly more cus clones might not be perfect)

Middle cone stand straight out
Right cone hug them close from the right

Its more important that both are all the way
at the edge of the tower than how close you are

Left cone inside 2nd hitbox ring
slightly left in tower
